ref_title: Hellscape Taiwan: A Porcupine Defense in the Drone Age – Deep Dive
ref_text: Technological overconfidence: Electronic warfare, AI countermeasures, and cyber capabilities could neutralize autonomous swarms before they deploy; Ukraine-Russia conflict shows rapid adaptation cycles favor both offense and defense
